title: Global Counsel meetings and correspondences
text:
Global Counsel meetings and correspondences

Date released:
 27 February 2026

Request number: 
202602076

Release of information under:
 Freedom of Information Act 2000 (FOIA)

Information requested

A list of all meetings between the consultancy firm Global Counsel and directors or senior civil servants within the authority in the time period 1 January 2022–present.

For each meeting, please also provide

list of attendees

full meeting minutes

any related correspondences, written, by email or orally delivered (if recorded).

All written correspondence between Global Counsel and directors or senior civil servants within the authority in the time period 1 January 2022–present. This includes letters and email.

Information released

We confirm that under s.1 of the FOIA, we do not hold the information you have requested. We have searched the information we hold on our systems along with records of meetings and correspondence of senior members of ONR and have not found any of the information you have requested.

Exemption(s) applied:

None

Public Interest Test (PIT):

N/A


                            Published
                        


                            10 March 2026
                        

Freedom of Information
